titleStmt.title: SII 24.470: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 470. (A.R. No. 66 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records gift of the income from the village Uttamaśōḻanallūr in Maṇappiḍināḍu, a sub-division of Tiruchchirāppaḷḷi uśāvaḍi for offerings to god by Nārapparāja, son of Mahāmaṇḍalēsvara Nandyāla Nāraśiṅgarāja. Refers to a previous gift of a portion of the income from the same village for a feeding house conducted by Śiru-Tirumalaiyyaṅgār, son of Tāḷappākkam Periya-Tirumalaiyyaṅgār. The details of date viz., Śaka 1473, Virōdhikṛit (for Virōdhi) Vṛiśchika, śu. 10, Friday, Rōhīṇī are irregular. If the tithi is a mistake for śu. 15, the details agree for 1551 A.D., November 13, Friday, ·38; f.d.n. ·19.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śubhamastu . svasti śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirāja rājaparameśva ran śrīvirapradāpa śrīvira śatāśivarāyamahārāyar prithivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābtam 1000 4 100 7 10 3ṉ
mel cellā niṉṟa virodi śrīsamvatsarattu viṛścikanāyaṟṟu purvapakṣattu daśamiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa rohaṇi nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulāśani viḷāvaṟāvitiva
ḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthatevar śrībhaṇḍārattukku Uttaradeśam nantayālam śomakula tilak(ā)rāṉa Ātraiyagotrañca Āpa stambasūtrattu yejusākhā
ddhyiyāṉa śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran nantiyālam naraciṅkarājāvin putran nārappa rājāveṉ poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi . tiruccilāp yaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi cellum maṇappiṭi nāṭṭu
kkuḷviṭṭa Uttamacoḻanallūr kiṟāmam 1- kku nāṉkellaik kuḷpaṭṭa nañcey puñcey nattam paṭukai tiṭar Uṭpaṭa na(ce)ñcey nilam 10 2(1/4)çma¥ puñcey nilam 10(1/4)ç® Āka naṉcey puñcey vuṭpaṭa nilam 2 10 2ntanyaël
devamānnyam dānamānnyam Uṭpaṭa nañcey nilam 3nta¿¥ puṉcey nilam 1ç nikki niṉṟa naṉcey nilam 8�m puñcey nilam 9 va� tāḷappākkam periya tirumalaiyyaṅkār putran ciṟuttirumalaiThis letter is engraved below the line.yyaṅkār taṉmam
Āka Ittiruppatiyil naṭakkiṟa rāmaānujakūṭattukku nāliloṉṟum puñcey nilam 2nya[®] puṉcey nilam Uvapa¿ nikki perumāḷ śrīraṅganāta devar koyil paṇṭāram Āka cetta paṅku muṇukku niṉṟa
nañcey nilam 6� puṉcey nilam 6 ntaçma¿ Āka nañcey puñcey Uṭpaṭa nilam 10 3(1/2)kku naṉcey velikku poṉ 16‘4’ must be the correct number.Āka kūṭṭiṉa pon_ 9 10 1u 4(1/4)¥ puṉcey velikku poṉ 2 Āka kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 10 4 Āka naṉcey puṉcey Uṭpaṭa
nilam 10 3kkukku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 100 5 U 4(1/4)¥ tānamānnyam devamānnya vakai piṟa varikku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 4u n=ta Āka poṉ100 9u 5 Inta poṉ nūṟṟu Oṉpatum paṇam Añcum koṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷum
campā taḷikai muṉṟukku U 3 Āka varuṣamkku nāḷ 3 100 9 10 5kku kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 100 9 U 5 Inta poṉ nūṟṟu Oṉpatum paṇam Añcum koṇṭe cantrāditya varaiyum Ācantrārkkasthādhi Āka naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum Inta
taḷikai muṉṟukku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nāliloṉṟukku Aṟunāḻi prasādamum tāḷappākkam periya tirumalaiyaṅkār putran ciṟu tirumalaiyyaṅkār taṉmam naṭakkiṟa rāmānujan kūṭattile śrī vaiyiṣṇavarkaḷ
Amutu ceyya nāḷtoṟum varakkaṭavarākavum . Intac cilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅga nārāyaṇa piriyaṉ Eḻuttu dānapālanayormaddhye dānāt śreyonupālanam dānāt svargamavāpnoti pālanādyaccudam padam .
Digital edition of SII 24.470 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
